svg.title: Trigger Key Theft — Three Vaults Compared
svg.desc: Animated diagram showing what happens when the trigger/hot key is compromised across all three vault designs. Each vault defends differently: CTV uses cold sweep, CCV uses keyless recovery, OP_VAULT uses authorized recovery. CTV has an escalation risk if fee key is also compromised.
svg.text: Trigger Key Theft — Three Vaults Compared
